records.m_Talk_ENG: There were once Three Beasts that devoured human souls.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There were once Three Beasts that devoured human souls.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There were once Three Beasts that devoured human souls.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tormented by endless hunger, they eventually turned their eyes on the world itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tormented by endless hunger, they eventually turned their eyes on the world itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tormented by endless hunger, they eventually turned their eyes on the world itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Three swordsmen rose and struck them down, severing their heads. They became known as the Three Blades.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Three swordsmen rose and struck them down, severing their heads. They became known as the Three Blades.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Three swordsmen rose and struck them down, severing their heads. They became known as the Three Blades.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the calamity returned in less than a generation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the calamity returned in less than a generation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the calamity returned in less than a generation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Children born on the cursed lands soaked in the Beast Blood found their souls seized by a dark curse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Children born on the cursed lands soaked in the Beast Blood found their souls seized by a dark curse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Children born on the cursed lands soaked in the Beast Blood found their souls seized by a dark curse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Earthbound.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Earthbound.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Earthbound.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That unspeakable curse stirred the Beast Blood in their veins, endlessly gnawing at their fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That unspeakable curse stirred the Beast Blood in their veins, endlessly gnawing at their fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That unspeakable curse stirred the Beast Blood in their veins, endlessly gnawing at their fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Beasts buried in purgatory were fated to rise again, fed by the tears, sorrow, and blood of those children.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Beasts buried in purgatory were fated to rise again, fed by the tears, sorrow, and blood of those children.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Beasts buried in purgatory were fated to rise again, fed by the tears, sorrow, and blood of those children.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To battle the undying Beasts became the eternal burden of Trivanguard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To battle the undying Beasts became the eternal burden of Trivanguard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To battle the undying Beasts became the eternal burden of Trivanguard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think, Administrator? How will this world end?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think, Administrator? How will this world end?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think, Administrator? How will this world end?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You just said it yourself. No one in Trivanguard was ever destined to kill the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You just said it yourself. No one in Trivanguard was ever destined to kill the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You just said it yourself. No one in Trivanguard was ever destined to kill the Tiger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that's true, then we'll fail to stop it. The throne of the Demon Lord will be claimed and the world will fall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that's true, then we'll fail to stop it. The throne of the Demon Lord will be claimed and the world will fall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that's true, then we'll fail to stop it. The throne of the Demon Lord will be claimed and the world will fall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's how it'll go. Like it or not, we're the only ones who can even wound the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's how it'll go. Like it or not, we're the only ones who can even wound the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's how it'll go. Like it or not, we're the only ones who can even wound the Tiger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I had an unusual experience today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I had an unusual experience today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I had an unusual experience today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I read the fortune of a child born Earthbound, yet fate said nothing of death by the Beast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I read the fortune of a child born Earthbound, yet fate said nothing of death by the Beast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I read the fortune of a child born Earthbound, yet fate said nothing of death by the Beast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Born of Beast Blood, yet untouched by its fate? A contradiction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Born of Beast Blood, yet untouched by its fate? A contradiction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Born of Beast Blood, yet untouched by its fate? A contradiction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fate may bend under pressure, but it always snaps back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fate may bend under pressure, but it always snaps back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fate may bend under pressure, but it always snaps back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe that contradiction is what'll break us through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe that contradiction is what'll break us through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe that contradiction is what'll break us through.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So then, what do we do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So then, what do we do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So then, what do we do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there's nothing else to aim for, let's aim for the contradiction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there's nothing else to aim for, let's aim for the contradiction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there's nothing else to aim for, let's aim for the contradiction.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Prepare everything we can for the wall of apocalypse coming our way
8v

Prepare everything we can for the wall of apocalypse coming our way
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Prepare everything we can for the wall of apocalypse coming our way

records.m_Talk_ENG: And find that single crack to break through it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And find that single crack to break through it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And find that single crack to break through it.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vIncredible. You cleared a 10km-radius red zone alone in half a day.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vIncredible. You cleared a 10km-radius red zone alone in half a day.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vIncredible. You cleared a 10km-radius red zone alone in half a day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're amazing, truly! The Administration's last hope! Humanity's hero!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're amazing, truly! The Administration's last hope! Humanity's hero!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're amazing, truly! The Administration's last hope! Humanity's hero!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pipe down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pipe down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pipe down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like things are in order. I'll have the auger sent with the escort fleet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like things are in order. I'll have the auger sent with the escort fleet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like things are in order. I'll have the auger sent with the escort fleet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The auger? You mean that massive rocket in the hangar? I was intrigued by the spiral propulsion unit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The auger? You mean that massive rocket in the hangar? I was intrigued by the spiral propulsion unit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The auger? You mean that massive rocket in the hangar? I was intrigued by the spiral propulsion unit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was built to pierce through the Tiger's domain barrier. Got help from Dongwol.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was built to pierce through the Tiger's domain barrier. Got help from Dongwol.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was built to pierce through the Tiger's domain barrier. Got help from Dongwol.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Haha
8v I only offered a few ideas, that's all.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Haha
8v I only offered a few ideas, that's all.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Haha
8v I only offered a few ideas, that's all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gate open.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gate open.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gate open.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Armored ships Lake Superior and Bayern. Ready to enter red zone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Armored ships Lake Superior and Bayern. Ready to enter red zone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Armored ships Lake Superior and Bayern. Ready to enter red zone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Destination is Point B. Approximately one hundred fifty seconds until transportation of the auger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Destination is Point B. Approximately one hundred fifty seconds until transportation of the auger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Destination is Point B. Approximately one hundred fifty seconds until transportation of the auger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Multiple flying C.O.s approaching. Engaging now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Multiple flying C.O.s approaching. Engaging now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Multiple flying C.O.s approaching. Engaging now!

Hold on. Just spotted an unidentified entity
8v!

Hold on. Just spotted an unidentified entity
8v!

Hold on. Just spotted an unidentified entity

That energy reading
8v! It matches the Tiger's signature waveform!

That energy reading

records.m_Talk_FRA:
That energy reading
8v! It matches the Tiger's signature waveform!

records.m_Talk_FRA: So the Tiger realized the auger was a threat.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But with its power harvest nearly complete, I doubt it'll leave the barrier itself.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Massive dark cloud activity forming over the red zone. Escort squadrons pulling back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave the stragglers to the Counters.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave the stragglers to the Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Tiger's yours, Seosaeng.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vI'll take it from here.


8vI'll take it from here.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vI'll take it from here.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Activating Eternium Drive, locking phase coordinates
8v! Igniting boosters!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Activating Eternium Drive, locking phase coordinates
8v! Igniting boosters!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Activating Eternium Drive, locking phase coordinates
8v! Igniting boosters!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're breaching the barrier!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're breaching the barrier!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're breaching the barrier!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't let you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't let you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't let you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Spatial distortion detected at predicted impact zone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Spatial distortion detected at predicted impact zone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Spatial distortion detected at predicted impact zone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The auger's trajectory just shifted! It's heading for the retreating Lake Superior!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The auger's trajectory just shifted! It's heading for the retreating Lake Superior!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The auger's trajectory just shifted! It's heading for the retreating Lake Superior!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was that a spatial slash?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was that a spatial slash?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was that a spatial slash?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dongwol.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dongwol.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dongwol.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, sir!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, sir!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, sir!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Firing backup boosters
8v! Adjusting trajectory!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Firing backup boosters
8v! Adjusting trajectory!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Firing backup boosters
8v! Adjusting trajectory!

records.m_Talk_ENG: An emergency turn unit? They even planned for this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An emergency turn unit? They even planned for this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An emergency turn unit? They even planned for this?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Not that it matters. I'll just rewind it again
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Not that it matters. I'll just rewind it again
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Not that it matters. I'll just rewind it again
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's far enough, Yeonhwa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's far enough, Yeonhwa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's far enough, Yeonhwa.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vHa Dam.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vHa Dam.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vHa Dam.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you forgotten? You've never once beaten me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you forgotten? You've never once beaten me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you forgotten? You've never once beaten me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I've never once given up on you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I've never once given up on you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I've never once given up on you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even after all that loss, you still haven't figured it out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even after all that loss, you still haven't figured it out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even after all that loss, you still haven't figured it out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the only one who can save you from this cycle of pain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're breaching the barrier!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're breaching the barrier!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're breaching the barrier!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't let you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't let you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't let you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Spatial distortion detected at predicted impact zone!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Spatial distortion detected at predicted impact zone!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Spatial distortion detected at predicted impact zone!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The auger's trajectory just shifted! It's heading for the retreating Lake Superior!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The auger's trajectory just shifted! It's heading for the retreating Lake Superior!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The auger's trajectory just shifted! It's heading for the retreating Lake Superior!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Was that a spatial slash?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Was that a spatial slash?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Was that a spatial slash?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dongwol.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dongwol.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dongwol.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, sir!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, sir!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, sir!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Firing backup boosters
8v! Adjusting trajectory!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Firing backup boosters
8v! Adjusting trajectory!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Firing backup boosters
8v! Adjusting trajectory!

root.m_Talk_ENG: An emergency turn unit? They even planned for this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: An emergency turn unit? They even planned for this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: An emergency turn unit? They even planned for this?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Not that it matters. I'll just rewind it again
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Not that it matters. I'll just rewind it again
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Not that it matters. I'll just rewind it again
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's far enough, Yeonhwa.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's far enough, Yeonhwa.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's far enough, Yeonhwa.

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vHa Dam.
root.m_Talk_DEU:

8vHa Dam.
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vHa Dam.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you forgotten? You've never once beaten me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you forgotten? You've never once beaten me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you forgotten? You've never once beaten me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I've never once given up on you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I've never once given up on you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I've never once given up on you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even after all that loss, you still haven't figured it out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even after all that loss, you still haven't figured it out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even after all that loss, you still haven't figured it out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the only one who can save you from this cycle of pain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm the only one who can save you from this cycle of pain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm the only one who can save you from this cycle of pain.
